Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyMagicQua.name: Arcanist's Etcher
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyMagicQua.description: Improves the [Quality|quality] of a wand, staff or sceptre

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollRa.name: Chaos Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollRa.description: Removes a random modifier and augments a [ItemRarity|Rare] item with a new random modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollRa.name: Greater Chaos Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollRa.description: Removes a random modifier and augments a [ItemRarity|Rare] item with a new random modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollRa.name: Perfect Chaos Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollRa.description: Removes a random modifier and augments a [ItemRarity|Rare] item with a new random modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDuplicat.name: Mirror of Kalandra
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDuplicat.description: Creates a [Mirrored] copy of an item

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHinekora.name: Hinekora's Lock
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHinekora.description:
Allows an item to foresee the result of the next Currency item used on it
Modifying the item in any way removes the ability to foresee

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeT.name: Orb of Alchemy
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeT.description: Upgrades a [ItemRarity|Normal] or [ItemRarity|Magic] item to a [ItemRarity|Rare] item with 4 random modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeR.name: Orb of Chance
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeR.description: Unpredictably either upgrades a [ItemRarity|Normal] item to [ItemRarity|Unique] rarity or destroys it

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyPassiveR.name: Orb of Regret
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyPassiveR.description: Grants a passive skill refund point

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAtlasPas.name: Orb of Unmaking
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAtlasPas.description: Grants an atlas passive skill refund point

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeT.name: Orb of Transmutation
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeT.description: Upgrades a [ItemRarity|Normal] item to a [ItemRarity|Magic] item with 1 modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeT.name: Greater Orb of Transmutation
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeT.description: Upgrades a [ItemRarity|Normal] item to a [ItemRarity|Magic] item with 1 modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeT.name: Perfect Orb of Transmutation
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeT.description: Upgrades a [ItemRarity|Normal] item to a [ItemRarity|Magic] item with 1 modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollMa.name: Orb of Alteration
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollMa.description: Reforges a magic item with new random modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyConvertT.name: Orb of Scouring
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyConvertT.description: Removes all modifiers from an item

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddModTo.name: Exalted Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddModTo.description: Augments a [ItemRarity|Rare] item with a new random modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddModTo.name: Greater Exalted Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddModTo.description: Augments a [ItemRarity|Rare] item with a new random modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddModTo.name: Perfect Exalted Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddModTo.description: Augments a [ItemRarity|Rare] item with a new random modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeM.name: Regal Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeM.description: Upgrades a [ItemRarity|Magic] item to a [ItemRarity|Rare] item, adding 1 modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeM.name: Greater Regal Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeM.description: Upgrades a [ItemRarity|Magic] item to a [ItemRarity|Rare] item, adding 1 modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeM.name: Perfect Regal Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeM.description: Upgrades a [ItemRarity|Magic] item to a [ItemRarity|Rare] item, adding 1 modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddModTo.name: Orb of Augmentation
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddModTo.description: Augments a [ItemRarity|Magic] item with a new random modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddModTo.name: Greater Orb of Augmentation
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddModTo.description: Augments a [ItemRarity|Magic] item with a new random modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddModTo.name: Perfect Orb of Augmentation
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddModTo.description: Augments a [ItemRarity|Magic] item with a new random modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyGemQuali.name: Gemcutter's Prism
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyGemQuali.description: Improves the [Quality|quality] of a Skill Gem

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollSo.name: Chromatic Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollSo.description: Change the colour of a socket on a Skill Gem

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollSo.name: Orb of Fusing
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollSo.description: Reforges the links between sockets on an item

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddSkill.name: Lesser Jeweller's Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddSkill.description: Sets a Skill Gem to have 3 Support Gem Sockets

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddSkill.name: Greater Jeweller's Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddSkill.description: Sets a Skill Gem to have 4 Support Gem Sockets

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddSkill.name: Perfect Jeweller's Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddSkill.description: Sets a Skill Gem to have 5 Support Gem Sockets

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddEquip.name: Artificer's Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddEquip.description: Adds an [Augment] Socket to a [MartialWeapon|Martial Weapon], wand, staff or Armour

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyModValue.name: Divine Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyModValue.description: Randomises the numeric values of modifiers on an item

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollIm.name: Blessed Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollIm.description: Randomises the numeric values of the implicit modifiers of an item

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollDe.name: Sacred Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollDe.description: Randomises the numeric values of base defences on an armour

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyCorrupt.name: Vaal Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyCorrupt.description: Modifies an item unpredictably and [Corrupted|Corrupts] it

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.name: Architect's Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.description: Modifies a [Corrupted] [Equipment] or [Jewel] item unpredictably or destroys it

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.name: Crystallised Corruption
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.description: Modifies a [Corrupted] Skill Gem unpredictably or destroys it

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.name: Core Destabiliser
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.description: Modifies a [SoulCore|Soul Core] unpredictably, with a chance to destroy it

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.name: Vaal Cultivation Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.description:
Replaces up to 2 modifiers on a [Corrupted] [UniqueCulture|Vaal Unique]
Replaces other [ItemRarity|Uniques] with a Corrupted Unique of the same Item Class

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.name: Brutal Orb of Sacrifice
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.description:
Upgrades a [Corrupted|Corruption] Enchantment on a [ItemRarity|Rare] Weapon or Quiver
And removes a random Modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.name: Fortified Orb of Sacrifice
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.description:
Upgrades a [Corrupted|Corruption] Enchantment on a [ItemRarity|Rare] Armour
And removes a random Modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.name: Profane Orb of Sacrifice
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.description:
Upgrades a [Corrupted|Corruption] Enchantment on a [ItemRarity|Rare] Amulet, Ring or Belt
And removes a random Modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.name: Royal Orb of Sacrifice
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.description:
Upgrades a [Corrupted|Corruption] Enchantment on a [ItemRarity|Rare] Jewel
And removes a random Modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.name: Vaal Infuser
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.description:
Improves the [Quality|quality] of a [MartialWeapon|Martial Weapon], [CasterWeapon|Caster Weapon] or [Armour]
above 20% with a chance of [Corrupted|Corrupting] it

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.name: Orb of Extraction
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.description: Destroys an [Equipment] item, returning any [Augment|Augments] socketed in it

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyIncursio.name: [DNT] Incursion Gemcutter's Prism (not visible to players)

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyItemiseC.name: Bestiary Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyItemiseC.description: Stores a Beast in an item

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyItemiseS.name: Surveyor's Compass
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyItemiseS.description: Stores a Sextant Modifier in an item

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollSk.name: Prime Regrading Lens
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollSk.description: Change the type of quality of a skill gem with quality to another random quality

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollSu.name: Secondary Regrading Lens
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollSu.description: Change the type of quality of a support gem with quality to another random quality

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHeistWea.name: Tempering Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHeistWea.description: Adds or replaces an enchantment on a weapon. This may reforge the weapon's sockets.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHeistArm.name: Tailoring Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHeistArm.description: Adds or replaces an enchantment on a body armour. This may reforge the body armour's sockets.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEssenceA.name: Essence of Command
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEssenceA.description: Upgrades a [ItemRarity|Magic] item to a [ItemRarity|Rare] item, adding a guaranteed modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyPerfectE.name: Perfect Essence of Command
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyPerfectE.description: Removes a random modifier and augments a [ItemRarity|Rare] item with a new guaranteed modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddAtlas.name: Simple Sextant
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddAtlas.description: Adds or rerolls a modifier on a Voidstone.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddAtlas.name: Prime Sextant
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddAtlas.description: Adds or rerolls a modifier on a Voidstone.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddAtlas.name: Awakened Sextant
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddAtlas.description: Adds or rerolls a modifier on a Voidstone.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddAtlas.name: Elevated Sextant
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddAtlas.description: Adds or rerolls a modifier on a Voidstone.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencySealMapL.name: Apprentice Cartographer's Seal
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencySealMapL.description: Uncompletes a white map on the Atlas

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencySealMapM.name: Journeyman Cartographer's Seal
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencySealMapM.description: Uncompletes a yellow or white map on the Atlas

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencySealMapH.name: Master Cartographer's Seal
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencySealMapH.description: Uncompletes any map on the Atlas

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRespecSh.name: Unshaping Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRespecSh.description: Downgrades a map on the Atlas

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyBreachUp.name: Blessing of Xoph
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyBreachUp.description: Upgrades a breach unique item or breachstone to a more powerful version

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyBreachUp.name: Blessing of Tul
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyBreachUp.description: Upgrades a breach unique item or breachstone to a more powerful version

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyBreachUp.name: Blessing of Esh
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyBreachUp.description: Upgrades a breach unique item or breachstone to a more powerful version

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyBreachUp.name: Blessing of Uul-Netol
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyBreachUp.description: Upgrades a breach unique item or breachstone to a more powerful version

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyBreachUp.name: Blessing of Chayula
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyBreachUp.description: Upgrades a breach unique item or breachstone to a more powerful version

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRemoveMo.name: Orb of Annulment
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRemoveMo.description: Removes a random modifier from an item

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeT.name: Orb of Binding
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeT.description: Upgrades a normal item to a rare item with up to four linked sockets

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollMa.name: Orb of Horizons
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollMa.description: Reforges a map item as another of the same tier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeM.name: Harbinger's Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeM.description: Reforges a map item as another of a higher tier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyStrongbo.name: Engineer's Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyStrongbo.description: Improves the quality of a Strongbox

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyStrongbo.name: Infused Engineer's Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyStrongbo.description: Greatly improves the quality and rewards of a Strongbox and strengthens its defenders

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollUn.name: Ancient Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRerollUn.description: Reforges a unique equipment as another of the same item class

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyFracture.name: Fracturing Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyFracture.description: [Fracture|Fracture] a random modifier on a rare item with at least 4 modifiers, locking it in place.

Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.name: Simple Rope Net
Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.description:
Effective against Beasts of levels 1 to 13.
Activate to use this type of Net when capturing Beasts.

Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.name: Reinforced Rope Net
Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.description:
Effective against Beasts of levels 7 to 23.
Activate to use this type of Net when capturing Beasts.

Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.name: Strong Rope Net
Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.description:
Effective against Beasts of levels 15 to 35.
Activate to use this type of Net when capturing Beasts.

Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.name: Simple Iron Net
Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.description:
Effective against Beasts of levels 25 to 46.
Activate to use this type of Net when capturing Beasts.

Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.name: Reinforced Iron Net
Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.description:
Effective against Beasts of levels 37 to 56.
Activate to use this type of Net when capturing Beasts.

Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.name: Strong Iron Net
Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.description:
Effective against Beasts of levels 48 to 66.
Activate to use this type of Net when capturing Beasts.

Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.name: Simple Steel Net
Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.description:
Effective against Beasts of levels 58 to 70.
Activate to use this type of Net when capturing Beasts.

Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.name: Reinforced Steel Net
Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.description:
Effective against Beasts of levels 60 to 75.
Activate to use this type of Net when capturing Beasts.

Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.name: Strong Steel Net
Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.description:
Effective against Beasts of levels 64 and above.
Activate to use this type of Net when capturing Beasts.

Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.name: Thaumaturgical Net
Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.description:
Effective against Beasts of levels 68 and above.
Activate to use this type of Net when capturing Beasts.

Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.name: Necromancy Net
Metadata/Items/Currency/Bestiary/Bestiar.description:
Can be used on Beast corpses of all levels.
Activate to use this type of Net when capturing Beasts.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description:
More Fire modifiers
No Cold modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Frigid Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description:
More Cold modifiers
No Fire modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Jagged Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description:
More Physical modifiers
No Chaos modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Aberrant Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description:
More Chaos modifiers
No Lightning modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Pristine Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description:
More Life modifiers
No Defence modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Dense Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description:
More Defence modifiers
No Life Modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Corroded Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description:
More Physical Ailment or Chaos Ailment modifiers
No Elemental modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Prismatic Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description:
More Elemental modifiers
No Physical Ailment or Chaos Ailment modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Aetheric Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description:
More Caster modifiers
Fewer Attack modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Serrated Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description:
More Attack modifiers
Fewer Caster modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Lucent Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description:
More Mana modifiers
No Speed modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Shuddering Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description:
More Speed modifiers
No Mana modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Bound Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description: More Minion, Aura or Curse modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Perfect Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description: Improved Quality

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Deft Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description:
More Critical modifiers
No Attribute modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Fundamental Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description:
More Attribute modifiers
No Critical modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Faceted Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description: More Gem modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Bloodstained Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description:
Corrupted
Has a Corrupted implicit modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Hollow Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description: Has an Abyssal socket

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Fractured Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description:
Creates a split copy. Cannot be used to split Influenced,
Enchanted, Fractured, or Synthesised items.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Glyphic Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description: Has a Corrupt Essence modifier

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Tangled Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description:
Makes a random modifier type much more likely and prevents 
another random modifier type. Effects revealed once resonator is
fully socketed.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Sanctified Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description:
Numeric modifier values are lucky
High Level modifiers are more common

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.name: Gilded Fossil
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyDelveCra.description: Item is overvalued by vendors

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyJeweller.name: Flesh Catalyst
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyJeweller.description:
Adds [Quality|quality] that enhances Life modifiers on a ring or amulet
Replaces other quality types

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyJeweller.name: Neural Catalyst
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyJeweller.description:
Adds [Quality|quality] that enhances Mana modifiers on a ring or amulet
Replaces other quality types

Replaces other quality types

Replaces other quality types

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyJeweller.name: Reaver Catalyst
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyJeweller.description:
Adds [Quality|quality] that enhances [Attack] modifiers on a ring or amulet
Replaces other quality types

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyJeweller.name: Sibilant Catalyst

Adds [Quality|quality] that enhances [Spell|Caster] modifiers on a ring or amulet
Replaces other quality types

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyJeweller.name: Skittering Catalyst

Adds [Quality|quality] that enhances Speed modifiers on a ring or amulet
Replaces other quality types

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyJeweller.name: Adaptive Catalyst
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyJeweller.description:
Adds [Quality|quality] that enhances [Attributes|Attribute] modifiers on a ring or amulet
Replaces other quality types

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHarbinge.name: Time-light Scroll
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHarbinge.description: Upgrades The Flow Untethered to a more powerful version

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHarbinge.name: Fragmentation Scroll
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHarbinge.description: Upgrades The Fracturing Spinner to a more powerful version

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHarbinge.name: Deregulation Scroll
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHarbinge.description: Upgrades The Tempest's Binding to a more powerful version

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHarbinge.name: Electroshock Scroll
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHarbinge.description: Upgrades The Rippling Thoughts to a more powerful version

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHarbinge.name: Haemocombustion Scroll
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHarbinge.description: Upgrades The Enmity Divine to a more powerful version

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHarbinge.name: Specularity Scroll
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHarbinge.description: Upgrades The Unshattered Will to a more powerful version

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddGemEx.name: Facetor's Lens
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyAddGemEx.description: Adds stored experience to a gem, up to its maximum level

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRitualSt.name: Ritual Vessel
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyRitualSt.description: Stores the monsters slain for the first time from a completed Ritual Altar for future use

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.name: Lesser Eldritch Ember
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.description: Adds a Lesser Searing Exarch implicit modifier to a Body Armour, Boots, Gloves or Helmet. This replaces any existing implicit modifiers other than Eater of Worlds implicit modifiers.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.name: Greater Eldritch Ember
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.description: Adds a Greater Searing Exarch implicit modifier to a Body Armour, Boots, Gloves or Helmet. This replaces any existing implicit modifiers other than Eater of Worlds implicit modifiers.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.name: Grand Eldritch Ember
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.description: Adds a Grand Searing Exarch implicit modifier to a Body Armour, Boots, Gloves or Helmet. This replaces any existing implicit modifiers other than Eater of Worlds implicit modifiers.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.name: Exceptional Eldritch Ember
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.description: Adds an Exceptional Searing Exarch implicit modifier to a Body Armour, Boots, Gloves or Helmet. This replaces any existing implicit modifiers other than Eater of Worlds implicit modifiers.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.name: Lesser Eldritch Ichor
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.description: Adds a Lesser Eater of Worlds implicit modifier to a Body Armour, Boots, Gloves or Helmet. This replaces any existing implicit modifiers other than Searing Exarch implicit modifiers.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.name: Greater Eldritch Ichor
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.description: Adds a Greater Eater of Worlds implicit modifier to a Body Armour, Boots, Gloves or Helmet. This replaces any existing implicit modifiers other than Searing Exarch implicit modifiers.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.name: Grand Eldritch Ichor
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.description: Adds a Grand Eater of Worlds implicit modifier to a Body Armour, Boots, Gloves or Helmet. This replaces any existing implicit modifiers other than Searing Exarch implicit modifiers.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.name: Exceptional Eldritch Ichor
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.description: Adds an Exceptional Eater of Worlds implicit modifier to a Body Armour, Boots, Gloves or Helmet. This replaces any existing implicit modifiers other than Searing Exarch implicit modifiers.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyConflict.name: Orb of Conflict
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyConflict.description: Unpredictably raise the strength of one Searing Exarch or Eater of Worlds modifier on an item and lower the strength of another. Lesser modifiers that have their strength lowered will be removed.

Metadata/Items/Currency/DistilledEmotion.name: Diluted Liquid Ire
Metadata/Items/Currency/DistilledEmotion.description:
Can be combined with other [DistilledEmotion|Liquid Emotions] to Instil Amulets
with Notable Passive Skills

Metadata/Items/Currency/DistilledEmotion.name: Diluted Liquid Guilt
Metadata/Items/Currency/DistilledEmotion.description:
Can be combined with other [DistilledEmotion|Liquid Emotions] to Instil Amulets
with Notable Passive Skills

Metadata/Items/Currency/DistilledEmotion.description:
Can be combined with other [DistilledEmotion|Liquid Emotions] to Instil Amulets
with Notable Passive Skills

Can be combined with other [DistilledEmotion|Liquid Emotions] to Instil Amulets

Metadata/Items/AtlasExiles/AddModToRareC.name: Crusader's Exalted Orb
Metadata/Items/AtlasExiles/AddModToRareC.description: Adds Crusader influence and a new Crusader modifier to a rare item

Metadata/Items/AtlasExiles/AddModToRareR.name: Redeemer's Exalted Orb
Metadata/Items/AtlasExiles/AddModToRareR.description: Adds Redeemer influence and a new Redeemer modifier to a rare item

Metadata/Items/AtlasExiles/AddModToRareH.name: Hunter's Exalted Orb
Metadata/Items/AtlasExiles/AddModToRareH.description: Adds Hunter influence and a new Hunter modifier to a rare item

Metadata/Items/AtlasExiles/AddModToRareW.name: Warlord's Exalted Orb
Metadata/Items/AtlasExiles/AddModToRareW.description: Adds Warlord influence and a new Warlord modifier to a rare item

Metadata/Items/AtlasExiles/ApplyInfluenc.name: Awakener's Orb
Metadata/Items/AtlasExiles/ApplyInfluenc.description:
Destroys an item, applying its influence to another of the same item class
The second item is reforged as a rare item with both influence types and new modifiers

Metadata/Items/Heist/HeistCoin.name: Rogue's Marker
Metadata/Items/Heist/HeistCoin.description:
Creates a portal to the Rogue Harbour from a Town or Hideout
Used as Currency for services in the Rogue Harbour

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeI.name: Orb of Dominance
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyUpgradeI.description: Removes one Influenced Modifier from an item with at least two Influenced Modifiers and upgrades another Influenced Modifier. Upgrading a modifier of the highest tier transforms the modifier into an Elevated Modifier. Attempting to upgrade an Elevated Modifier rerolls its values. Can be used on Body Armours, Boots, Gloves and Helmets.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEnkindli.name: Enkindling Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEnkindli.description: Adds an enchantment to a utility flask that will improve it but prevent it from gaining charges during its effect. Replaces any existing enchantment.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyInstilli.name: Instilling Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyInstilli.description: Adds an enchantment to a utility flask that will cause it to be used when certain conditions are met. Replaces any existing enchantment.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHellscap.name: Tainted Chromatic Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHellscap.description: Unpredictably reforges the colour of sockets on a corrupted item

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHellscap.name: Tainted Orb of Fusing
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHellscap.description: Unpredictably adds or removes a link to the largest group of linked sockets on a corrupted item

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHellscap.name: Tainted Jeweller's Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHellscap.description: Unpredictably adds or removes a socket on a corrupted item

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHellscap.name: Tainted Chaos Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHellscap.description: Unpredictably either reforges a corrupted rare item with new random modifiers or removes all of its modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHellscap.name: Tainted Exalted Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHellscap.description: Unpredictably adds or removes a modifier on a corrupted rare item

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHellscap.name: Tainted Mythic Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHellscap.description: Unpredictably either upgrades a corrupted item to unique rarity or destroys it

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHellscap.name: Tainted Armourer's Scrap
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHellscap.description: Randomises the quality of a corrupted armour

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHellscap.name: Tainted Blacksmith's Whetstone
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHellscap.description: Randomises the quality of a corrupted weapon

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHellscap.name: Tainted Divine Teardrop
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyHellscap.description: Unpredictably raises or lowers the tier of each modifier on a corrupted rare item

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.name: Eldritch Chaos Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.description: If The Searing Exarch is dominant, reroll prefix modifiers. If The Eater of Worlds is dominant, reroll suffix modifiers.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.name: Eldritch Exalted Orb
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.description: If The Searing Exarch is dominant, add a prefix modifier. If The Eater of Worlds is dominant, add a suffix modifier.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.name: Eldritch Orb of Annulment
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyEldritch.description: If The Searing Exarch is dominant, remove a prefix modifier. If The Eater of Worlds is dominant, remove a suffix modifier.

Metadata/Items/Currency/ScoutingReports/.name: Singular Scouting Report
Metadata/Items/Currency/ScoutingReports/.description: Reroll all of Kirac's Atlas Missions, including at least one Unique map.

Metadata/Items/Currency/ScoutingReports/.name: Otherworldly Scouting Report
Metadata/Items/Currency/ScoutingReports/.description: Reroll all of Kirac's Atlas Missions, including at least one Breachstone.

Metadata/Items/Currency/ScoutingReports/.name: Comprehensive Scouting Report
Metadata/Items/Currency/ScoutingReports/.description: Reroll all of Kirac's Atlas Missions, adding additional mission options.

Metadata/Items/Currency/ScoutingReports/.name: Vaal Scouting Report
Metadata/Items/Currency/ScoutingReports/.description: Reroll all of Kirac's Atlas Missions, corrupting all non-Unique Maps.

Metadata/Items/Currency/ScoutingReports/.name: Delirious Scouting Report
Metadata/Items/Currency/ScoutingReports/.description: Reroll all of Kirac's Atlas Missions, adding layers of Delirium to all non-Unique Maps.

Metadata/Items/Currency/ScoutingReports/.name: Operative's Scouting Report
Metadata/Items/Currency/ScoutingReports/.description: Reroll all of Kirac's Atlas Missions, granting missions with rewarding implicit modifiers.

Metadata/Items/Currency/ScoutingReports/.name: Blighted Scouting Report
Metadata/Items/Currency/ScoutingReports/.description: Reroll all of Kirac's Atlas Missions, including at least one Blighted Map.

Metadata/Items/Currency/ScoutingReports/.name: Influenced Scouting Report
Metadata/Items/Currency/ScoutingReports/.description: Reroll all of Kirac's Atlas Missions, including at least one Shaper Guardian, Elder Guardian, or Elderslayer Map.

Metadata/Items/Currency/ScoutingReports/.name: Explorer's Scouting Report
Metadata/Items/Currency/ScoutingReports/.description: Reroll all of Kirac's Atlas Missions, using uncompleted Maps where possible.

Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyExtractO.name: Oil Extractor
Metadata/Items/Currency/CurrencyExtractO.description: Destroys an Anointed Item to recover one of the Oils that was used to apply that Anointment

Metadata/Items/Currency/SentinelCurrency.name: Power Core
Metadata/Items/Currency/SentinelCurrency.description: Destroys two Sentinels to create a fully-charged Sentinel with a combination of their properties. Sometimes, the resultant item is modified unpredictably

Metadata/Items/Currency/SentinelCurrency.name: Transforming Power Core
Metadata/Items/Currency/SentinelCurrency.description: Destroys two Sentinels to create a fully-charged Sentinel with a combination of their properties. Sometimes, the resultant item is modified unpredictably, with a higher chance of a special base type

Metadata/Items/Currency/SentinelCurrency.name: Amplifying Power Core
Metadata/Items/Currency/SentinelCurrency.description: Destroys two Sentinels to create a fully-charged Sentinel with a combination of their properties. Sometimes, the resultant item is modified unpredictably, with a higher chance of a upgrading the tier of modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/SentinelCurrency.name: Augmenting Power Core
Metadata/Items/Currency/SentinelCurrency.description: Destroys two Sentinels to create a fully-charged Sentinel with a combination of their properties. Sometimes, the resultant item is modified unpredictably, with a higher chance of new random modifiers

Metadata/Items/Currency/SentinelCurrency.name: Armour Recombinator
Metadata/Items/Currency/SentinelCurrency.description: Destroys two Armours to create a new Armour with a combination of their properties. Sometimes, the resultant item is modified unpredictably

Metadata/Items/Currency/SentinelCurrency.name: Weapon Recombinator
Metadata/Items/Currency/SentinelCurrency.description: Destroys two Weapons or Quivers to create a new Weapon or Quiver with a combination of their properties. Sometimes, the resultant item is modified unpredictably

Metadata/Items/Currency/SentinelCurrency.name: Jewellery Recombinator
Metadata/Items/Currency/SentinelCurrency.description: Destroys two Jewellery items to create a new Jewellery item with a combination of their properties. Sometimes, the resultant item is modified unpredictably

Metadata/Items/Sanctum/SanctumBronzeKey.name: Bronze Key
Metadata/Items/Sanctum/SanctumBronzeKey.description: Used to open Bronze Caches within the Trials

Metadata/Items/Sanctum/SanctumSilverKey.description: Used to open Silver Caches within the Trials

Metadata/Items/Sanctum/SanctumGoldKey.name: Gold Key
Metadata/Items/Sanctum/SanctumGoldKey.description: Used to open Gold Caches within the Trials

Metadata/Items/Sanctum/SanctumBronzeKeyD.description: Used to open Bronze Caches within the Trials

Metadata/Items/Sanctum/SanctumSilverKeyD.name: Silver Key
Metadata/Items/Sanctum/SanctumSilverKeyD.description: Used to open Silver Caches within the Trials

Metadata/Items/Sanctum/SanctumGoldKeyDro.name: Gold Key
